creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
Neat chess game here. Note that I've made the port name
"wmminichess" as opposed to the game's name "miniCHESS" per what
seems to be the "standard" for windowmaker dockapps - having a
"wm" prefixed seems the status quo.

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the shar to import the new port of wmminichess.
